headline: Goldman Sachs Links Blockchain Tokenization And AI IPOs With Undervalued Shares
summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) is emerging as a key facilitator in institutional blockchain projects through its support of the Canton Network alongside partners such as Visa and Microsoft. Canton has activated interoperability protocol LayerZero, allowing regulated institutions to move tokenized assets across public blockchains while maintaining compliance. At the same time, Goldman Sachs is viewed as a lead contender to underwrite upcoming AI and tech IPOs, including Anthropic and Moonshot AI,...

headline: Visa World Cup Parks Link Community Impact To Long Term Payments Growth
summary: Visa (NYSE:V), Street Soccer USA and Bank of America announced an expanded rollout of Visa Street Soccer Parks ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026. The program is set to reach every U.S. host city for the tournament, adding community soccer facilities and related programming. Alongside the parks, the new Visa & Main initiative will provide targeted support for local small businesses in these communities. For Visa, a global payments network, this type of community investment sits alongside its...

headline: Visa, Street Soccer USA and Bank of America to Bring Visa Street Soccer Parks to Every FIFA World Cup 2026™ Host City in the U.S.
summary: Visa, the Official Payment Technology Partner of the FIFA World Cup 26™, together with national nonprofit Street Soccer USA and Bank of America, the Official Bank Sponsor of the FIFA World Cup 26™, today announced a significant expansion of Visa Street Soccer Parks, bringing a new park to every host city in the U.S. ahead of this summer's tournament.
